title: K-200 Battery Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Battery Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-461-G. Revision: G. Type: analysis. Author: Dev Patel. Created: 2024-03-29. Last modified: 2024-11-04. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1022, P-1149, P-1025, P-1130.
